description: Create a T-shaped cross-section profile for a structural steel T-beam in SolveSpace consisting of a closed loop of 8 line segments. The profile must have a flange width of 60 mm, a flange thickness of 10 mm, a web height of 40 mm below the flange, and a web thickness of 8 mm. The web must be centered on the flange, with all edges constrained as horizontal or vertical and the four specific dimensions applied as constraints. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/t_beam_profile.slvs
